title: 10 best herbal teas for puffy eyes
description: Broad-leaved lime teas helps with puffy eyes because of its exceptional anti-inflammatory properties. The flavonoids present in the tea help to reduce swelling and ease puffiness, while also relaxing the muscles surrounding the eyes. Additionally, the calming effects of the tea can help to reduce stress and tension, which are common contributors to eye puffiness. By drinking broad-leaved lime teas, you can expect a reduction in puffiness and a more refreshed, revitalized appearance....
